description_text:
Nidek Medical Nuvo 8 LPM Oxygen Concentrator

Nidek Medical Nuvo 8, popularly known as Nidek Nuvo 8 Liter is a popular American origin high-flow oxygen concentrator that supplies oxygen at the flow rate of 1-8 LPM with oxygen purity of 90% (+5%/-3%) across all flow rates.

Weight: Nidek Nuvo 8 Liter weighs 25.2 kgs. It comes with smooth wheels and a top handle with an excellent grip for its easy transportation.

Power Consumption: The machine uses 500 watts of power.

Sound: This oxygen concentrator emits sound at 47 dB. 

Outlet Pressure: Outlet Pressure of Nidek Nuvo 8 Liter is 15 psi.

Operating Altitude: The operating altitude of the machine is 5000 feet

Oxygen Purity Indicator: An automatic alarm would turn on if the oxygen purity level falls below 86%, indicating that the patient needs to be shifted to the emergency backup.

Certifications and Approvals: Nidek Nuvo 8 is FDA Approved and CE Certified.

Warranty: The warranty period of Nidek Nuvo 8 Liter is 1 year.
